siteMetadata.titleDefault: CampusLyan - Free student housing in one place
siteMetadata.description: CampusLyan is a free platform where students can find student housing, rooms and housing queues from verified housing companies.
siteMetadata.ogTitle: CampusLyan - Free platform for student housing
siteMetadata.ogDescription: Find student housing for free. CampusLyan collects listings and queues from verified housing companies.

siteFooter.copyright: Copyright © {year} CampusLyan Nordics AB, org.nr 559587-0048. All rights reserved.

hero.title: Student homes in
hero.subtitle: Everything for student housing across Sweden. Listings, queues, verified housing companies and guides. Completely free.

items.title: Create your profile
items.desc: Enter your details once and use your profile when you apply for housing or contact housing companies.

items.title: Find the right homes and queues
items.desc: See available homes and the queues you should join so you do not miss an opportunity.

items.title: Apply and move in
items.desc: Apply directly, follow housing queues and keep your contacts with verified housing companies in one place.

stickyCards.headingHighlight: A better chance of finding a home.

items.title: Everything in one place
items.text: Find student housing across Sweden and join the right queues without jumping between different websites.

items.title: Verified housing companies
items.text: See listings and queues from established providers with clear information about terms, applications and next steps.

items.title: Guides that help you succeed
items.text: Get clarity on rules, documents and applications so you improve your chances of getting housing.

features.headingHighlight: Before, during and after your studies.

items.title: The right queues for the right city
Apply with a profile that makes a serious impression
Activities and discounts near your home
Swap housing with other students while you are away

waitlist.heading: Ready to find your next student home?
waitlist.subtitle: Join the waitlist and we will email you as soon as we launch.
waitlist.emailPlaceholder: Enter your email to find your next student home
waitlist.privacyPrefix: By joining the waitlist you accept CampusLyan's

errors.tooLong: The email address is too long.

success.alreadyRegistered: That email address is already registered, you are all set.
